title: 'People flew from their seats': Passengers describe how crash unfolded
description: The East of England Ambulance Service says nearly 90 people have been injured -over 30 of them seriously.

title: What we know so far about Bedford train crash
description: Two East Midland Railway trains crashed into each other, with emergency services now on the scene

title: Video shows scene of collision as passenger speaks about aftermath
description: Passenger Pete Knapp said the crash "felt like [he'd] been in a bomb explosion".

title: PM under pressure from Labour MPs and ministers to set timetable for exit
description: The BBC has been told that the transport secretary is among those advising Starmer to set out a timetable.

title: Israel and Hezbollah agree ceasefire, US says, as more Lebanon strikes reported
description: The agreement followed concerns that continued clashes would undermine the deal to end the war between the US and Iran.
